hooks.command: FAILED=0; [ -n "$(find backend/tests/hurl -name '*.hurl' 2>/dev/null)" ] && { hurl --test backend/tests/hurl/*.hurl --variable base_url=http://localhost:8000 2>&1 | tail -5 || FAILED=1; }; [ -n "$(find frontend/e2e -name '*.spec.ts' 2>/dev/null)" ] && { (cd frontend && npx playwright test --reporter=line 2>&1 | tail -5) || FAILED=1; }; [ $FAILED -eq 1 ] && exit 2; exit 0
